description: Reproduce a bug, write a failing test, spawn a code agent to fix it, verify, and open a PR.

brief.scope: Reproduce only — do NOT fix. Write a failing test that demonstrates the bug. Output: test file path and the exact failure message.
Fix the bug demonstrated by the failing test at {{reproduce.output}}. The test must pass. Do not modify the test.
Open a PR for the current branch. Title: 'Fix: {{bug_description}}'. Body: include the reproduction steps, root cause, and what was changed. Link to any relevant issue.

_note: Stops on failure because each step depends on the previous. No point opening a PR if fix failed.
